privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated mission requirements detailed in relocation_directive.txt. The GEO satellite starts at an SMA of 42164.17 km and must be relocated eastward (+30 degrees) over 15 to 45 days. To achieve the eastward drift, the orbit must be lowered. The scoring logic provides relaxed bounds for validation: drift orbit SMA between 42000.0 and 42160.0 km (which physically encompasses the calculated limits of ~42009.15 to ~42112.34 km for a two-impulse relocation), and total delta-V between 2.0 and 20.0 m/s (which encompasses the physical limits of ~3.79 to ~11.36 m/s). Outputs must be written to explicit paths matching the task instructions.
